name: resumeforge-ai
description: AI-powered SaaS platform for resume building and job search optimization

scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/database && pnpm prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:prod: cd packages/database && pnpm prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cd packages/database && pnpm prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: cd packages/database && pnpm prisma migrate reset
